name: Vicinity Centres
analysis: VCX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.5505. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.5624 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.5505, stop A$2.3760, target A$2.5750. Risk/reward is 0.14:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
